seriesTitle: Detective Cyto Kine and Deputy Pip: Micro-Mysteries of the Human Body
purpose: Default local episode-memory seed for the rebuilt app. Runtime story-memory artifacts remain the authoritative per-run continuity record.
continuityNotes: Keep the detectives as felt characters in cinematic 3D anatomy spaces.
Do not front-load the diagnosis before the fair-play reveal.
Keep all lettering and teaching text out of generated panel art.
